title: Michauxia strigosa
taxonomy: Michauxia strigosa is classified within the plant family Campanulaceae. It is a species of flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. The plant belongs to the genus Michauxia, which is a small group of flowering plants. Michauxia strigosa is also known as the "Michauxia" or "strigose Michauxia" due to its strigose leaves. This classification places Michauxia strigosa within the broader category of dicotyledonous angiosperms.
